# Sprint 1 — Vertical Slice Foundation
**Dates**: 2026-03-25 → 2026-04-08 (2 weeks)  
**Generated by**: CCGS /sprint-plan (producer + technical-director + lead-programmer)

---

## Sprint Goal

> Get one complete loop running end-to-end: TV shows QR code → player scans on phone → joins lobby → picks a hero → game starts → plays Polar Push → sees results.

This is the vertical slice. Everything else is secondary to proving the social funnel works.

---

## Capacity

| | Value |
|-|-------|
| Total sprint days | 10 working days |
| Buffer (20%) | 2 days reserved for unknowns |
| Available | 8 days focused |
| Target milestone | Vertical Slice v1 |

---

## Tasks

### 🔴 Must Have — Critical Path (blocks vertical slice)

| ID | Task | Agent/Owner | Est. Days | Dependencies | Acceptance Criteria |
|----|------|-------------|-----------|--------------|---------------------|
| S1-01 | Create Unity 6 project + URP setup | unity-specialist | 0.5 | — | Project opens, URP active, 60fps in Game view |
| S1-02 | Import packages: WebSocketSharp, Addressables, Cinemachine, ZXing | unity-specialist | 0.5 | S1-01 | All packages import without errors |
| S1-03 | Place existing C# files into Unity project + fix namespaces | lead-programmer | 1.0 | S1-01 | All .cs files compile cleanly in Unity |
| S1-04 | Wire ControllerGateway WebSocket server (replace stubs) | network-programmer | 1.0 | S1-03 | TV starts WebSocket on port 8765; phone can connect |
| S1-05 | Local HTTP server for phone-controller.html | network-programmer | 0.5 | S1-04 | Phone browser opens controller from TV IP |
| S1-06 | QR code generator on TV attract screen | ui-programmer | 0.5 | S1-04 | QR codes encode correct ws:// join URL |
| S1-07 | TV Lobby scene: player cards + character select | ui-programmer | 1.5 | S1-04 | All players see live hero lock state on TV |
| S1-08 | Polar Push: full play loop (spawn → play → eliminate → end) | gameplay-programmer | 1.5 | S1-03 | 2+ players can play from start to elimination |
| S1-09 | Results scene: scores + "Next Game" card | ui-programmer | 0.5 | S1-08 | Results display correctly for 2–4 players |
| S1-10 | End-to-end integration test: QR → lobby → Polar Push → results | qa-tester | 1.0 | All above | Full loop works on 2 phones without errors |

**Total Must Have: 8.5 days**

## Carryover from Previous Sprint

*(Sprint 1 — no previous sprint)*

---

## Risks

| Risk | Probability | Impact | Mitigation |
|------|-------------|--------|------------|
| WebSocketSharp compatibility issues with Unity 6 | Medium | High | Have Mirror Networking WebSocket transport as fallback |
| Phone browser WebSocket blocked by local network firewall | Medium | Medium | Test on same WiFi AP; document IP setup instructions |
| Polar Push physics instability at high player count | Low | Medium | Cap at 4 players for vertical slice, tune masses |
| QR code URL encoding edge cases | Low | Low | Use a battle-tested ZXing.Net library, not custom |

---

## Agent Assignments for Sprint 1

| Agent | Primary Tasks |
|-------|--------------|
| **unity-specialist** | S1-01, S1-02 — Project setup and package configuration |
| **lead-programmer** | S1-03 — Unity project integration of existing C# |
| **network-programmer** | S1-04, S1-05 — WebSocket server + HTTP server |
| **ui-programmer** | S1-06, S1-07, S1-09, S1-13 — QR, lobby scene, results, haptics |
| **gameplay-programmer** | S1-08 — Polar Push play loop |
| **qa-tester** | S1-10, S1-17 — Integration test + unit tests |
| **technical-artist** | S1-11 — Placeholder hero models |
| **unity-shader-specialist** | S1-12 — Ice shader |
| **sound-designer** | S1-14 — SFX stubs |

---

## Definition of Done for Sprint 1

- [ ] Unity 6 project opens and runs at 60fps on the host machine
- [ ] Phone browser connects via QR code scan without manual URL entry
- [ ] 2+ players can join, pick heroes, and see live lobby state on TV
- [ ] Polar Push plays from start to last-player-wins with score shown
- [ ] Results screen displays correct scores
- [ ] Full loop passes on at least 2 different phone models (iOS + Android)
- [ ] No S1 or S2 bugs in the vertical slice flow
- [ ] Integration test documented in `tests/playtest/`

---

## Next Sprint Preview (Sprint 2 — Core Alpha)

After vertical slice ships, Sprint 2 targets:
- Color Clash + Tank Battle (complete the 3 proof mini-games)
- All 8 hero models (basic quality, on-rig)
- Full session playlist (random rotation)
- Score persistence across 3+ mini-games
- TV podium scene
